summary: Iteration 114: Continuity Director Agent feature testing complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). All three continuity endpoints working correctly. Frontend code structure verified with all required data-testid attributes present.
critical_code_review_comments: continuity_director.py: Has analyze_continuity(), auto_correct_issue(), build_character_reference() functions
continuity_director.py: Uses Gemini Vision (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview) for analysis via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
continuity_director.py: Processes scenes in batches of 3 to avoid timeouts
continuity_director.py: Returns structured report with severity levels (high/medium/low)
studio.py: Has all 3 continuity endpoints at lines 1717-1940
studio.py: POST /continuity/analyze starts background analysis, returns {status: 'analyzing'}
studio.py: GET /continuity/status returns continuity_status and continuity_report
studio.py: POST /continuity/auto-correct filters high/medium issues for correction
studio.py: GET /projects/{id}/status includes continuity_status and continuity_report fields
studio.py: Returns 400 for analyze when project has no panels
studio.py: Returns 400 for auto-correct when no report exists

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 114 verified Continuity Director Agent feature: 1) POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/continuity/analyze starts background analysis and returns {status: 'analyzing'}, 2) GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/continuity/status returns continuity_status (phase: analyzing/done/correcting/corrected/error) and continuity_report, 3) POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/continuity/auto-correct starts background correction of high/medium issues, 4) GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status includes continuity_status and continuity_report fields, 5) Error handling: analyze returns 400 for project with no panels, auto-correct returns 400 when no report exists, 6) Frontend StoryboardEditor.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (continuity-director-panel, continuity-analyze-btn, continuity-correct-btn). Project fce897cf6ba3 has analysis already done with 57 issues (40H, 11M, 6L). DO NOT trigger actual analysis or auto-correct (they cost API credits and take long time).
